creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: cs
Date: Fri Jan 31 20:53:40 2014
New Revision: 342068
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/342068
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r342068/

Log:
  - Update to 1.02.000
  - Support staging
  
  PR:		ports/183347

Deleted:
  head/games/gnubg/files/
Modified:
  head/games/gnubg/Makefile
  head/games/gnubg/distinfo
  head/games/gnubg/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/gnubg/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/gnubg/Makefile	Fri Jan 31 20:49:18 2014	(r342067)
+++ head/games/gnubg/Makefile	Fri Jan 31 20:53:40 2014	(r342068)
@@ -2,28 +2,22 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	gnubg
-PORTVERSION=	0.15
-PORTREVISION=	11
+PORTVERSION=	1.02.000
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.gnubg.org/media/sources/:src \
-		${MASTER_SITE_GNU_ALPHA:S/$/:ts/}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}/:ts
-DISTFILES=	gnubg-source-MAIN-20070601.tar.gz:src \
-		gnubg_ts0.bd.gz:ts
-EXTRACT_ONLY=	gnubg-source-MAIN-20070601.tar.gz
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.c-s.li/ports/ \
+		http://files.gnubg.org/media/sources/
+DISTFILES=	gnubg-release-${PORTVERSION}-sources.tar.gz
 
-MAINTAINER=	cs@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	gahr@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	GNU Backgammon
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	bison:${PORTSDIR}/devel/bison
-LIB_DEPENDS=	gmp.10:${PORTSDIR}/math/gmp \
-		gdbm.4:${PORTSDIR}/databases/gdbm \
+LIB_DEPENDS=	gmp:${PORTSDIR}/math/gmp \
+		gdbm:${PORTSDIR}/databases/gdbm \
 		png15:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png \
 		gtkextra-x11-2.0.1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtkextra2 \
 		gtkglext-x11-1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtkglext
 
-WRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/gnubg
-
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	ESOUND NLS
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=ESOUND NLS
 
@@ -31,14 +25,14 @@ CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-board3d
 
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	ac_cv_path_ARTSC_CONFIG=no ac_cv_path_LIBART_CONFIG=no
 
-USE_GNOME=	gnomehack libxml2
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+USE_GNOME=	libxml2
+USES=		gmake pathfix shebangfix
+USE_PYTHON=	2.0+
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool automake
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MESOUND}
@@ -60,17 +54,13 @@ CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-sse
 .endif
 
-MAN6=	gnubg.6
 INFO=	gnubg
 
 CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 
-post-extract:
-	${GUNZIP_CMD} --stdout ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/gnubg_ts0.bd.gz > ${WRKSRC}/gnubg_ts0.bd
-
 post-patch:
-	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|libpng12|libpng15|g' ${WRKSRC}/configure.in
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|bin\/bash|${PREFIX}bin\/bash|g' ${WRKSRC}/scripts/query_player.sh
 
 pre-configure:
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ./autogen.sh

-SIZE (gnubg-source-MAIN-20070601.tar.gz) = 8421846
-SHA256 (gnubg_ts0.bd.gz) = 0934e4f2d84f5cd50c2ff4592c93c49d43f7cb89da342600736849c7362626d5
-SIZE (gnubg_ts0.bd.gz) = 5899380
+SHA256 (gnubg-release-1.02.000-sources.tar.gz) = 7ece7fc02481f8e6c08869306f1cf52cad9ec5ddd675de67782cf028a6dcb504
+SIZE (gnubg-release-1.02.000-sources.tar.gz) = 14985346
